service_radius: Dumfries and Galloway (Thornhill, Dumfries, Sanquhar, Moffat, Lockerbie and surrounding areas)
target_customers: Local homeowners in Dumfries & Galloway — people looking for a reliable local joiner for kitchen fitting, home renovations, and general carpentry
how_customers_find_them: Word of mouth only — no online presence at all
local_competition: Low — most local joiners in rural D&G have no website or have outdated templates. A clean modern site will immediately differentiate.
photography_available: Client has phone shots of past work but these won't be available until after initial design approval. Designs must work without professional photography.
strategic_notes: No online presence at all — the site IS the entire digital footprint. Google Business profile should be created alongside the site.
No professional photography — design must be typography-led and structure-led, not photo-dependent. Gallery should work with placeholder images initially and look good with phone shots later.

Local SEO is the biggest win — almost no competition for 'joiner in Thornhill', 'carpenter Dumfries and Galloway', 'kitchen fitter Dumfries'. Per-area pages targeting Thornhill, Dumfries, Sanquhar, Moffat, Lockerbie will dominate local search.

Young business with no reviews — site needs to build credibility through process (How We Work section), clear service descriptions, and prominent contact details. Testimonials section should be designed but can be populated later.
Young owner (26) — site should feel modern and energetic, not heritage-heavy. No 'established since...' messaging. Focus on quality of work and approachability instead.
House building is a differentiator — most local joiners do repairs and fitting. Building entire houses is a premium service worth highlighting.
